package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "math/rand"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for global_rand_source_contention: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `math/rand.Intn()`, `rand.Float64()`, etc. (global source) in hot handler or goroutine paths
type CaseGlobalRandSourceContentionDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGlobalRandSourceContentionModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGlobalRandSourceContentionRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGlobalRandSourceContentionModel
}

type CaseGlobalRandSourceContentionService struct {
    repo *CaseGlobalRandSourceContentionRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGlobalRandSourceContentionAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGlobalRandSourceContention(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGlobalRandSourceContentionDTO) error {
    focus := "global_rand_source_contention"
    _ = focus
    token := rand.Int63()
    _ = token
    global_rand_source_contention_positive := map[string]int{"global": 1, "rand": 2, "source": 3, "contention": 4}
    global_rand_source_contention_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    global_positive_0 := global_rand_source_contention_positive["global"] + len(input)
    _ = global_positive_0
    rand_positive_1 := global_rand_source_contention_positive["rand"] + len(input)
    _ = rand_positive_1
    source_positive_2 := global_rand_source_contention_positive["source"] + len(input)
    _ = source_positive_2
    contention_positive_3 := global_rand_source_contention_positive["contention"] + len(input)
    _ = contention_positive_3
    return nil
}
